x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: ACC telemetry is the continuous data feed that powers DEX AI diagnosis. Without active telemetry flow, DEX AI cannot perform real-time endpoint health analysis or proactive anomaly detection.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure the Agent Client Collector (ACC) is installed and running on endpoint devices. ACC is the telemetry collection mechanism that feeds DEX AI — without active data flow, all AI diagnosis capabilities are non-functional. Check ACC connectivity via the DEX workspace.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c26
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[ACC telemetry is the continuous data feed that powers DEX AI diagnosis. Without active telemetry flow, DEX AI cannot perform real-time endpoint health analysis or proactive anomaly detection.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>ACC Telemetry Data Flow</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-30);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('dex_ci_device_data');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' device data records received in last 30 days';

    if (count >= 1000) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' device telemetry records received in the last 30 days. ACC is actively collecting data — DEX AI has current endpoint context for diagnosis and analysis.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' device telemetry records in the last 30 days (target: 1,000+). ACC data flow is limited — DEX AI diagnosis will have incomplete endpoint coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' device telemetry records in the last 30 days. Insufficient ACC data flow — DEX AI cannot perform meaningful diagnosis without active telemetry from endpoints.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>DEX</module>
<number>CHK0006150</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure the Agent Client Collector (ACC) is installed and running on endpoint devices. ACC is the telemetry collection mechanism that feeds DEX AI — without active data flow, all AI diagnosis capabilities are non-functional. Check ACC connectivity via the DEX workspace.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c26</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
